title: Hymn for the Weekend
why_this_song: Hymn for the Weekend by Coldplay (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "That we shoot across the sky (symphony, so high, so high)"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "That we shoot across the sky (symphony, pour on a...)"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "That we shoot across the sky (symphony, pour on a...)"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And said drink from me, drink from me (oh-ah-oh-ah)"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "That we shoot across the sky (symphony, pour on a...)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Got me feeling drunk and high, so high, so high
Now I'm feeling drunk and high, so high, so high (woo)
That we shoot across the sky
Drink from me, drink from me (oh-ah-oh-ah)
That we shoot across the sky (symphony, so high, so high)
That we shoot across the sky

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "high" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "high" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shoot" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shoot" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That we shoot across the sky
Now I just can't get enough

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Drink from me, drink from me (oh-ah-oh-ah)
Oh, angel sent from up above

exercises.prompt_en: "Hymn for the Weekend" was released in 2015. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hymn for the Weekend" foi lançada em 2015. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Hymn for the Weekend" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Hymn for the Weekend" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
